title: Apple stock sees slight bump following Q2 2026 earnings report
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Apple stock rose 5.35% to close at $271.35 following its Q2 2026 earnings report, driven by strong iPhone demand and Services expansion. Analysts projected 13 t
excerpt: Apple stock rose 5.35% to close at $271.35 following its Q2 2026 earnings report, driven by strong iPhone demand and Services expansion. Analysts projected 13 to 16 percent revenue growth for the quarter.

content.introduction: Apple stock rose 5.35% to close at $271.35 following its Q2 2026 earnings report, driven by strong iPhone demand and Services expansion. Analysts projected 13 to 16 percent revenue growth for the quarter.
body: Analysts are projecting 13 to 16 percent revenue growth for the quarter, fueled by strong iPhone demand and continued expansion in Services.
